docs.title: Palgogo
docs.text:
Backend engineer focused on reliable systems, clear communication, and practical architecture.

This site is a simple home for:

  • short notes from real engineering work
  • selected projects and experiments
  • useful links and ways to connect

Quick note

This site is built with MkDocs Material, and admonitions are enabled.

docs.title: About
docs.text:
Hi, I am Palgogo.

I work on backend and distributed systems with a focus on:

  • Java and Spring services
  • databases, messaging, and consistency tradeoffs
  • observability and production reliability

This site is intentionally lightweight. I use it to share practical notes, project snapshots, and ideas I want to refine over time.

docs.title: Contact
docs.text:
The easiest way to reach me:

  • GitHub: Palgogo

More channels can be added here later.

docs.title: Current focus
docs.text:
• building dependable backend foundations
  • system design practice and write-ups
  • automation and DevOps tooling

docs.text:
• project cards with architecture notes
